'''Kwannot''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] [[Duel on Kwannot|killed]] [[Mana Veridi]] sometime prior to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|12|Once Bitten}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
